name: v-startup-game
description: V-Startup: Đường Đua Kiến Tạo - Realtime multiplayer game

scripts.dev: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js -n SERVER,CLIENT -c cyan.bold,magenta.bold "node server/index.js" "cd client && node ../node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js"
scripts.start: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js -n SERVER,CLIENT -c cyan.bold,magenta.bold "node server/index.js" "cd client && node ../node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js"
